passage_title: The Intersection of Health Sciences and Geography

sentences.sentence: While many diseases that affect humans have been eradicated due to improvements in vaccinations and the availability of healthcare, there are still areas around the world where certain health issues are more prevalent.
sentences.translation: 尽管许多影响人类的疾病已经因为疫苗接种的进步和医疗保健的普及而被根除，世界上仍有一些地区，某些健康问题更加普遍。

structure.text: While many diseases that affect humans have been eradicated due to improvements in vaccinations and the availability of healthcare
many diseases
that affect humans
have been eradicated
there are still areas around the world
where certain health issues are more prevalent

difficult_points: While 引导让步状语从句，先承认很多疾病已被根除，再转向仍然存在的地区性健康问题。
that affect humans 修饰 many diseases，说明这些疾病影响的是人类。
have been eradicated 是现在完成时的被动语态，强调疾病已经被消灭这一结果。
where 引导定语从句修饰 areas around the world，说明这些地区中某些健康问题更常见。

sentences.sentence: In a world that is far more globalised than ever before, people come into contact with one another through travel and living closer and closer to each other.
sentences.translation: 在一个比以往任何时候都更加全球化的世界里，人们通过旅行以及彼此居住得越来越近而相互接触。

structure.text: In a world that is far more globalised than ever before
that is far more globalised than ever before
people
come into contact with one another
through travel and living closer and closer to each other

difficult_points: 句首介词短语提供全球化的背景，其中 that 从句修饰 world。
far more globalised than ever before 使用比较结构，强调全球化程度超过以往。
through 后连接 travel 和 living 两个并列方式，说明人们接触增加的原因。
closer and closer 表示程度逐渐增强，即居住距离越来越近。

expressions.meaning_zh: 比以往任何时候都更加……

sentences.sentence: As a result, super-viruses and other infections resistant to antibiotics are becoming more and more common.
sentences.translation: 因此，超级病毒和其他对抗生素有抵抗力的感染正变得越来越常见。

structure.text: As a result
super-viruses and other infections resistant to antibiotics
resistant to antibiotics
are becoming more and more common

difficult_points: As a result 是结果连接语，承接前一句人群接触增加的背景。
resistant to antibiotics 是后置形容词短语，修饰 other infections。
are becoming 使用现在进行时，强调这类感染增多是正在发展的趋势。
more and more common 表示“越来越普遍”，体现程度的持续变化。

sentences.sentence: Geography can often play a very large role in the health concerns of certain populations.
sentences.translation: 地理因素常常会在某些人群的健康问题中发挥非常重要的作用。

structure.text: Geography
can often play a very large role
in the health concerns of certain populations

difficult_points: can often 表示一种常见可能性，而不是绝对规律。
play a very large role in 是固定搭配，表示“在……中起重要作用”。
of certain populations 修饰 health concerns，限定这些健康问题属于特定人群。

expressions.text: play a very large role in
expressions.meaning_zh: 在……中发挥非常重要的作用

sentences.sentence: For instance, depending on where you live, you will not have the same health concerns as someone who lives in a different geographical region.
sentences.translation: 例如，根据你居住的地方不同，你不会和生活在另一个地理区域的人有相同的健康问题。

structure.text: For instance
depending on where you live
where you live
you
will not have the same health concerns
as someone who lives in a different geographical region
who lives in a different geographical region

difficult_points: depending on where you live 是现在分词短语，说明健康问题差异取决于居住地点。
where you live 是名词性从句，作 depending on 的宾语。
the same ... as ... 构成比较结构，表示两类人的健康问题并不相同。
who lives in a different geographical region 修饰 someone，进一步说明比较对象。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps one of the most obvious examples of this idea is malaria-prone areas, which are usually tropical regions that foster a warm and damp environment in which the mosquitoes that can give people this disease can grow.
sentences.translation: 也许这一观点最明显的例子之一就是疟疾易发地区；这些地区通常是热带地区，会形成温暖潮湿的环境，使能够把这种疾病传给人的蚊子得以生长。

structure.text: Perhaps one of the most obvious examples of this idea
is malaria-prone areas
which are usually tropical regions
that foster a warm and damp environment
in which the mosquitoes that can give people this disease can grow
that can give people this disease

difficult_points: 主语 one of the most obvious examples 后接 is malaria-prone areas，表示举例对象是疟疾易发地区。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，补充说明 malaria-prone areas 通常是热带地区。
that foster a warm and damp environment 修饰 tropical regions，解释这些地区的环境特点。
in which 引导嵌套定语从句，说明蚊子能在这种环境中生长。

expressions.text: one of the most obvious examples
foster a warm and damp environment

sentences.sentence: Malaria is much less of a problem in high-altitude deserts, for instance.
sentences.translation: 例如，在高海拔沙漠地区，疟疾问题要小得多。

structure.text: Malaria
is much less of a problem
in high-altitude deserts
for instance

difficult_points: much 修饰比较级 less，强调问题少得多。
less of a problem 表示“不那么成问题”，不是数量上的“更少的一个问题”。
in high-altitude deserts 提供地理条件，与前一句的热带潮湿地区形成对比。

sentences.sentence: In some countries, geographical factors influence the health and well-being of the population in very obvious ways.
sentences.translation: 在一些国家，地理因素以非常明显的方式影响着人口的健康和福祉。

structure.text: In some countries
geographical factors
influence the health and well-being of the population
in very obvious ways

difficult_points: 句首 In some countries 限定讨论范围，不是全世界所有国家。
the health and well-being 是并列宾语核心，表示健康和整体福祉。
of the population 修饰 health and well-being，说明受影响的是人口整体。
in very obvious ways 表示影响方式明显，为下文城市污染例子做铺垫。

sentences.sentence: In many large cities, the wind is not strong enough to clear the air of the massive amounts of smog and pollution that cause asthma, lung problems, eyesight issues and more in the people who live there.
sentences.translation: 在许多大城市中，风力不够强，无法清除空气中大量的烟雾和污染物；这些烟雾和污染会导致居住在那里的人患上哮喘、肺部问题、视力问题等。

structure.text: In many large cities
the wind
is not strong enough
to clear the air of the massive amounts of smog and pollution
that cause asthma, lung problems, eyesight issues and more
in the people who live there
who live there

difficult_points: not strong enough to do 表示“不够强，无法做某事”，to clear 说明不足造成的结果。
clear the air of ... 中 of 后说明被清除的对象，即大量烟雾和污染。
that cause asthma, lung problems, eyesight issues and more 修饰 smog and pollution，说明污染导致的健康后果。
who live there 修饰 the people，there 指代前面的 many large cities。

sentences.sentence: Part of the problem is, of course, the massive number of cars being driven, in addition to factories that run on coal power.
sentences.translation: 当然，问题的一部分在于大量汽车在行驶，此外还有使用煤炭供能的工厂。

structure.text: Part of the problem
is
of course
the massive number of cars being driven
being driven
in addition to factories that run on coal power
that run on coal power

difficult_points: Part of the problem 作主语，真正说明问题来源的是后面的表语。
of course 是插入语，去掉后句子主干仍然完整。
being driven 是现在分词短语，后置修饰 cars，强调汽车正在被使用。
that run on coal power 修饰 factories，说明工厂以煤炭为能源。

sentences.sentence: The rapid industrialisation of some countries in recent years has also led to the cutting down of forests to allow for the expansion of big cities, which makes it even harder to fight the pollution with the fresh air that is produced by plants.
sentences.translation: 近年来，一些国家的快速工业化还导致森林被砍伐，以便大城市扩张；这使得依靠植物产生的新鲜空气来对抗污染变得更加困难。

structure.text: The rapid industrialisation of some countries in recent years
has also led to the cutting down of forests
to allow for the expansion of big cities
which makes it even harder to fight the pollution with the fresh air
to fight the pollution with the fresh air
that is produced by plants

difficult_points: 主语 The rapid industrialisation 后接现在完成时 has led to，说明近年工业化已经造成结果。
the cutting down of forests 是名词化表达，指砍伐森林这一行为。
to allow for the expansion of big cities 表示砍伐森林的目的。
which 引导非限制性定语从句，概括前面整件事造成的后果。

sentences.sentence: It is in situations like these that the field of health geography comes into its own.
sentences.translation: 正是在这样的情形中，健康地理学这一领域才真正发挥出自身价值。

structure.text: It is in situations like these that
in situations like these
the field of health geography
comes into its own

difficult_points: It is ... that 是强调句型，强调的是 in situations like these。
situations like these 指前文所说地理因素影响健康的各种情形。
comes into its own 是习语，表示某领域在合适场景中显出价值或发挥作用。

expressions.meaning_zh: 开始充分发挥作用；显出价值

sentences.sentence: It is an increasingly important area of study in a world where diseases like polio are re-emerging, respiratory diseases continue to spread, and malaria-prone areas are still fighting to find a better cure.
sentences.translation: 在一个小儿麻痹症等疾病重新出现、呼吸系统疾病持续传播、疟疾易发地区仍在努力寻找更好疗法的世界里，它是一个越来越重要的研究领域。

structure.text: It
is an increasingly important area of study
in a world where diseases like polio are re-emerging, respiratory diseases continue to spread, and malaria-prone areas are still fighting to find a better cure
where diseases like polio are re-emerging, respiratory diseases continue to spread, and malaria-prone areas are still fighting to find a better cure
diseases like polio are re-emerging
respiratory diseases continue to spread
malaria-prone areas are still fighting to find a better cure

difficult_points: It 指代前一句的 the field of health geography。
where 引导定语从句修饰 a world，后面列出这个世界中的三种健康挑战。
are re-emerging、continue to spread 和 are still fighting 是三个并列分句，说明健康地理学重要性上升的背景。
to find a better cure 是不定式短语，表示 malaria-prone areas 努力的目的。

expressions.text: an increasingly important area of study
expressions.meaning_zh: 越来越重要的研究领域

sentences.sentence: Health geography is the combination of, on the one hand, knowledge regarding geography and methods used to analyse and interpret geographical information, and on the other, the study of health, diseases and healthcare practices around the world.
sentences.translation: 健康地理学一方面结合了有关地理的知识以及用于分析和解释地理信息的方法，另一方面也结合了对世界各地健康、疾病和医疗保健实践的研究。

structure.text: Health geography
is the combination of
on the one hand
knowledge regarding geography and methods used to analyse and interpret geographical information
used to analyse and interpret geographical information
and on the other
the study of health, diseases and healthcare practices around the world

difficult_points: the combination of 后面由 on the one hand 和 on the other 分成两个并列组成部分。
regarding geography 修饰 knowledge，表示“关于地理的知识”。
used to analyse and interpret geographical information 是过去分词短语，修饰 methods。
the study of health, diseases and healthcare practices around the world 是第二个并列宾语。

sentences.sentence: The aim of this hybrid science is to create solutions for common geography-based health problems.
sentences.translation: 这门混合学科的目标是为常见的、基于地理因素的健康问题创造解决方案。

structure.text: The aim of this hybrid science
is
to create solutions for common geography-based health problems
for common geography-based health problems

difficult_points: The aim 作主语，of this hybrid science 说明目标属于这门交叉学科。
to create solutions 是不定式短语作表语，说明目标的具体内容。
geography-based health problems 是复合修饰，指由地理因素相关或地理基础上的健康问题。

expressions.meaning_zh: 基于地理因素的健康问题

sentences.sentence: While people will always be prone to illness, the study of how geography affects our health could lead to the eradication of certain illnesses, and the prevention of others in the future.
sentences.translation: 虽然人们总会容易生病，但研究地理如何影响我们的健康，可能会在未来促成某些疾病的根除，并预防其他疾病。

structure.text: While people will always be prone to illness
people
will always be prone to illness
the study of how geography affects our health
how geography affects our health
could lead to the eradication of certain illnesses, and the prevention of others in the future

difficult_points: While 引导让步状语从句，承认人类不可能完全免于疾病。
be prone to illness 表示“容易生病”，是对人类普遍状态的概括。
how geography affects our health 是名词性从句，作 the study of 的内容。
the eradication of certain illnesses 和 the prevention of others 是 lead to 后的并列结果。

sentences.sentence: By understanding why and how we get sick, we can change the way we treat illness and disease specific to certain geographical locations.
sentences.translation: 通过理解我们为何以及如何生病，我们可以改变治疗特定地理位置相关疾病的方式。

structure.text: By understanding why and how we get sick
why and how we get sick
we
can change the way
we treat illness and disease specific to certain geographical locations
specific to certain geographical locations

difficult_points: By understanding ... 表示手段，即通过理解生病原因和方式来改变治疗方式。
why and how we get sick 是并列疑问词引导的名词性内容。
the way 后省略了关系词 that 或 in which，后面的 we treat ... 修饰 the way。
specific to certain geographical locations 后置修饰 illness and disease，表示与特定地理位置相关。

sentences.sentence: The geography of disease and ill health analyses the frequency with which certain diseases appear in different parts of the world, and overlays the data with the geography of the region, to see if there could be a correlation between the two.
sentences.translation: 疾病与健康不良的地理学分析某些疾病在世界不同地区出现的频率，并把这些数据与该地区的地理情况叠加，以查看二者之间是否可能存在相关性。

structure.text: The geography of disease and ill health
analyses the frequency with which certain diseases appear in different parts of the world
with which certain diseases appear in different parts of the world
and overlays the data with the geography of the region
to see if there could be a correlation between the two
if there could be a correlation between the two

difficult_points: 主语 The geography of disease and ill health 后有两个并列谓语 analyses 和 overlays。
with which certain diseases appear 是介词提前的定语从句，修饰 frequency。
to see ... 表示叠加数据的目的。
the two 指代疾病出现频率的数据和该地区地理情况。

sentences.sentence: Health geographers also study factors that could make certain individuals or a population more likely to be taken ill with a specific health concern or disease, as compared with the population of another area.
sentences.translation: 健康地理学家还研究一些因素，这些因素可能使某些个人或某一人群与另一区域的人群相比，更有可能患上特定的健康问题或疾病。

structure.text: Health geographers
also study factors
that could make certain individuals or a population more likely to be taken ill with a specific health concern or disease
certain individuals or a population
more likely to be taken ill with a specific health concern or disease
as compared with the population of another area

difficult_points: that 引导定语从句修饰 factors，说明这些因素可能造成的影响。
make + 宾语 + 形容词补足语 结构中，certain individuals or a population 是宾语，more likely ... 是宾语补足语。
to be taken ill 是被动形式的不定式，表示“患病”。
as compared with ... 表示比较对象，是相对于另一区域人口而言。

sentences.sentence: Health geographers in this field are usually trained as healthcare workers, and have an understanding of basic epidemiology as it relates to the spread of diseases among the population.
sentences.translation: 这一领域的健康地理学家通常接受过医疗保健工作者的训练，并且了解基础流行病学，尤其是它与疾病在人群中传播的关系。

structure.text: Health geographers in this field
are usually trained as healthcare workers
and have an understanding of basic epidemiology
as it relates to the spread of diseases among the population
the spread of diseases among the population

difficult_points: are usually trained 和 have an understanding 是并列谓语，共用主语 Health geographers in this field。
as healthcare workers 表示接受训练后的身份或角色。
as it relates to ... 中 it 指 basic epidemiology，说明这里关注的是流行病学与疾病传播的关系。
among the population 修饰 the spread of diseases，表示疾病在人群内部传播。

expressions.meaning_zh: 接受训练成为；作为……受训

sentences.sentence: Researchers study the interactions between humans and their environment that could lead to illness (such as asthma in places with high levels of pollution) and work to create a clear way of categorising illnesses, diseases and epidemics into local and global scales.
sentences.translation: 研究人员研究人类与环境之间可能导致疾病的相互作用（例如高污染地区的哮喘），并努力创建一种清晰的方法，把小病、疾病和流行病按地方和全球尺度进行分类。

structure.text: Researchers
study the interactions between humans and their environment
that could lead to illness
such as asthma in places with high levels of pollution
and work to create a clear way of categorising illnesses, diseases and epidemics into local and global scales
to create a clear way of categorising illnesses, diseases and epidemics into local and global scales

difficult_points: study 和 work 是并列谓语，共同说明 Researchers 的两个任务。
that could lead to illness 修饰 interactions between humans and their environment，表示相互作用可能导致疾病。
括号中的 such as asthma ... 是插入例子，帮助说明 illness。
of categorising ... into local and global scales 修饰 a clear way，说明分类方法的内容。

sentences.sentence: Health geographers can map the spread of illnesses and attempt to identify the reasons behind an increase or decrease in illnesses, as they work to find a way to halt the further spread or re-emergence of diseases in vulnerable populations.
sentences.translation: 健康地理学家可以绘制疾病传播地图，并尝试找出疾病增加或减少背后的原因，同时努力寻找方法，阻止疾病在易受影响人群中进一步传播或重新出现。

structure.text: Health geographers
can map the spread of illnesses
and attempt to identify the reasons behind an increase or decrease in illnesses
to identify the reasons behind an increase or decrease in illnesses
as they work to find a way to halt the further spread or re-emergence of diseases in vulnerable populations
to halt the further spread or re-emergence of diseases in vulnerable populations

difficult_points: map 和 attempt 是并列动词，表示健康地理学家的两个行动。
behind an increase or decrease in illnesses 修饰 reasons，说明原因对应疾病数量变化。
as 引导时间或伴随状语从句，表示他们在寻找阻止疾病传播的方法时进行这些工作。
the further spread or re-emergence of diseases 是 halt 的并列宾语，指阻止进一步传播或再次出现。

sentences.sentence: The second subcategory of health geography is the geography of healthcare provision.
sentences.translation: 健康地理学的第二个子类别是医疗保健供给地理学。

structure.text: The second subcategory of health geography
is
the geography of healthcare provision

difficult_points: The second subcategory 表明这里进入健康地理学的另一个分支。
of health geography 修饰 subcategory，说明分类所属领域。
healthcare provision 指医疗保健资源或服务的提供，不是单纯的医疗知识。

sentences.sentence: This group studies the availability (or lack thereof) of healthcare resources to individuals and populations around the world.
sentences.translation: 这一群体研究世界各地个人和群体获得医疗保健资源的可用性（或其缺乏）。

structure.text: This group
studies the availability (or lack thereof) of healthcare resources
or lack thereof
to individuals and populations around the world

difficult_points: This group 指上一句提到的 healthcare provision 这一分支中的研究者。
or lack thereof 是括号插入语，表示也研究资源缺乏的情况。
of healthcare resources 修饰 availability，说明“可获得性”的对象是医疗资源。
to individuals and populations around the world 说明资源面向的对象和范围。

sentences.sentence: In both developed and developing nations there is often a very large discrepancy between the options available to people in different social classes, income brackets, and levels of education.
sentences.translation: 在发达国家和发展中国家，不同社会阶层、收入档次和教育水平的人们可获得的选择之间，往往存在非常大的差异。

structure.text: In both developed and developing nations
there is often a very large discrepancy
between the options available to people in different social classes, income brackets, and levels of education
available to people in different social classes, income brackets, and levels of education

difficult_points: there is 是存在句，真正的信息核心是 a very large discrepancy。
both developed and developing nations 表明这种差异在两类国家中都存在。
available to people ... 是后置形容词短语，修饰 options。
different social classes, income brackets, and levels of education 是并列范围，说明医疗选择差异与社会经济和教育因素相关。

expressions.meaning_zh: 发达国家和发展中国家

sentences.sentence: Individuals working in the area of the geography of healthcare provision attempt to assess the levels of healthcare in the area (for instance, it may be very difficult for people to get medical attention because there is a mountain between their village and the nearest hospital).
sentences.translation: 从事医疗保健供给地理学领域工作的人，会尝试评估该地区的医疗保健水平（例如，人们可能很难获得医疗救治，因为他们的村庄和最近的医院之间隔着一座山）。

structure.text: Individuals working in the area of the geography of healthcare provision
working in the area of the geography of healthcare provision
attempt to assess the levels of healthcare in the area
for instance, it may be very difficult for people to get medical attention because there is a mountain between their village and the nearest hospital
it may be very difficult for people to get medical attention
because there is a mountain between their village and the nearest hospital

difficult_points: working in the area ... 是现在分词短语，后置修饰 Individuals。
attempt to assess 表示“尝试评估”，后面宾语是 the levels of healthcare in the area。
括号内容是具体例子，用来说明如何评估医疗资源可及性。
because 引导原因状语从句，解释为什么获得医疗救治可能很困难。

sentences.sentence: These researchers are on the frontline of making recommendations regarding policy to international organisations, local government bodies and others.
sentences.translation: 这些研究人员处在提出政策建议的前线，向国际组织、地方政府机构以及其他对象提供相关建议。

structure.text: These researchers
are on the frontline of making recommendations
regarding policy
to international organisations, local government bodies and others

difficult_points: These researchers 指前一句从事医疗保健供给地理学研究的人。
on the frontline of 是比喻表达，表示处在行动或实践工作的最前沿。
making recommendations regarding policy 是动名词短语，说明这些研究人员具体做什么。
to international organisations, local government bodies and others 表示建议面向的对象。

sentences.sentence: The field of health geography is often overlooked, but it constitutes a huge area of need in the fields of geography and healthcare.
sentences.translation: 健康地理学领域常常被忽视，但它在地理和医疗保健领域中构成了一个需求巨大的领域。

structure.text: The field of health geography
is often overlooked
but it constitutes a huge area of need
in the fields of geography and healthcare

difficult_points: is often overlooked 是被动语态，表示该领域常被人忽视。
but 连接转折分句，强调被忽视并不代表不重要。
it 指代 The field of health geography。
a huge area of need 表示需求很大的领域，而不是地理面积。

sentences.sentence: If we can understand how geography affects our health no matter where in the world we are located, we can better treat disease, prevent illness, and keep people safe and well.
sentences.translation: 如果我们能够理解无论身处世界何地，地理如何影响我们的健康，我们就能更好地治疗疾病、预防疾病，并保护人们安全健康。

structure.text: If we can understand how geography affects our health no matter where in the world we are located
we
can understand how geography affects our health
how geography affects our health
no matter where in the world we are located
we can better treat disease, prevent illness, and keep people safe and well

difficult_points: If 引导条件状语从句，说明理解地理与健康关系是后面结果的条件。
how geography affects our health 是名词性从句，作 understand 的宾语。
no matter where in the world we are located 是让步结构，强调无论身在何处都适用。
treat disease, prevent illness, and keep people safe and well 是三个并列结果。
